title: Section 87D
content: 1[87D. Particulars of certificate, etc., to be furnished.--Every citizen of India who obtains, on or after the appointed day, a certificate, shall furnish, in such form and at such intervals as may be described, particulars of the certificate or certificates obtained by him and of his employment.]
footnote: 1. Part VIA ins. by Act 20 of 1979, s. 2 (w.e.f. 4-5-1979).
